name: allure-automationexercise
description: Relatórios Allure para os testes do AutomationExercise

scripts.restore-history: if exist allure-report\history copy /y allure-report\history\*.json allure-results\history\ >nul 2>&1
scripts.pre-generate: copy /y allure.properties allure-results\allure.properties >nul 2>&1 && npm run restore-history
scripts.generate: .\allure.cmd generate --clean -o allure-report allure-results --lang br --name "AutomationExercise" && node scripts\force-dark-mode.js
scripts.clean: if exist allure-results rmdir /s /q allure-results && if exist allure-report rmdir /s /q allure-report
scripts.full: npm run k6-to-allure && npm run pre-generate && npm run generate && npm run open
